title: Review "Go to pull request" button does not enable for a valid PR URL
reproSteps: Entering a valid pull request URL leaves the button disabled. Pressing Enter submits the same URL successfully.

title: Organization ACU limit accepts unsupported large values before failing with a generic error
reproSteps: The Manage organization modal and Create organization form accept values such as 100000000000000 client-side. Manage then returns only "Failed to update organization"; neither surface shows the supported maximum before submission.

title: Devin settings — model/capability toggles rejected with 400 "Fusion requires Devin Lite…" (Ultra reverts on reload)
reproSteps: Regression from #45170; whole settings payload re-validated so Ultra/Fast/native/lock-email all 400 and revert. Web search saves fine.

title: Knowledge folder contents ignore sort — only top-level items reorder
reproSteps: Sort applied to top-level list only, not nested folder children.

title: Environment Upkeep tab triggers 404 API error — /api/beta/ endpoint not found
reproSteps: Background call to /api/beta/ 404s when opening Upkeep tab; visible content still renders.

title: No file size validation on profile picture upload — 20MB file accepted silently
reproSteps: No client-side size limit or error toast on avatar upload.

title: Sub-org has no Sessions page in settings sidebar — direct navigation returns 404
reproSteps: Enterprise sidebar has Sessions; sub-org doesn't, and /settings/sessions hard-404s.

title: Snapshots "Filter by script" dropdown doesn't truncate long text — expands modal
reproSteps: Long auto-generated URN option wraps and stretches the dropdown.

title: Enterprise Sessions — clicking an active session from settings list crashes the app (React #185)
reproSteps: Maximum update depth exceeded for active/running sessions; completed sessions open fine.

title: Display language setting doesn't affect all UI elements — most content stays in English
reproSteps: Sidebar translates; most content labels/descriptions hard-code English.

title: Self-hosted GitLab "Register app" modal appears at top of page instead of centered
reproSteps: Modal renders at y=16px instead of vertically centered.

title: Automation Network policy "Add domain" accepts invalid/garbage values with no validation
reproSteps: javascript:alert(1), whitespace, schemes all accepted verbatim into a security allowlist.

title: Missing line break rendering in IdP groups help text
Grammatical error "1 members" should be "1 member" (singular)
reproSteps: Pluralization bug in org selector member counts.

title: API keys and org IDs exposed in plaintext in Guardrails violation logs
reproSteps: Guardrails blocks the message but the violation log shows the full unredacted secret.

title: Duplicate service user name "test-api key" in Devin API settings
reproSteps: Multiple service users share an identical name; no uniqueness warning.

title: Duplicate organization names in Organizations list
reproSteps: Multiple rows share visible names, including "ok1" and "p1". With no stable identifier shown, edit and delete actions are ambiguous.
